text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I don't wanna go home yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho and I are in a bit of a situation after
a day out.
choice_data_list: But we really need to head back.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: But why? It's not even dark yet!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I wanna keep going and I wanna eat something
sweet!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
The witching hour is only just starting! I'm not
going back! No way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad she had a good time today, but we need
to get back soon, or it'll interfere with her plans
later.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Hey, come and get me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, I notice some children that seem to be
trying to squeeze in every last bit of fun they can
before they each have to head home.
choice_data_list: All right, let's have some fun!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! That's what you shoulda said from the
start!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Let's just get to the tr—
choice_data_list: I'm gonna go talk to those kids real quick.
I'm gonna go talk to those kids real quick.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask the children if we can join their game and
they gladly agree. However...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: No! I don't wanna play any kiddie games!

text_block_list.name: Child A
text_block_list.text:
She's not gonna play?
Okay, let's keep racing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Humph... Hrm... GRRRRR!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be getting more and more upset. I
wonder how I can get her to enjoy herself...

text_block_list.name: Child B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can you break off this branch? I wanna make
a sword.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Making swords sounds like something Sweep
Tosho would want to join in on!
choice_data_list: Looks like we might need some magic...
Looks like we might need some magic...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...!
Did someone say magic?

text_block_list.name: Child B
text_block_list.text: No, I just need a grown-up to break it off for me.
choice_data_list: Oh! But we've got a witch right here!

text_block_list.name: Child A
text_block_list.text: Huh? You can use magic?

text_block_list.name: Child C
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That's amazing! I wanna see! Show us! Show
us!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
choice_data_list: Will you cast a spell for everyone?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Fine! I guess I can if you really want me to! ♪♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Powerful dimorphotheca! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crack!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you made two swords! How did you split it
so perfectly?! It really was like magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Because it really is magic! I found a weak point and concentrated my magic there!
choice_data_list:
(Well, it was more the power of her hands than
magic...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Here, I've enchanted this sword with magical
power. Take good care of it!

text_block_list.name: Child B
text_block_list.text: Um... Yeah... I will, thanks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That puts Sweep Tosho in a good mood and she
plays with everyone after!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm tired. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What magic circle?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...You mean those hopscotch circles?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho points to a long stretch of circles
that some children scribbled on the ground.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Those were just drawn by some kids. They don't
have any power.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list:
The person who drew those is actually a witch
that lives around here.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wait, really? Tell me more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that the circles have been
enchanted to give you more strength the more
you cross them.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Are you suuure?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I guess there's only one way to find out. What's
the order you have to jump?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Hop, hop, hop...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Wow!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Holy cow! I feel jam-packed with magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wait a second... This is really magic! Incredible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They aren't really enchanted, but it looks like
there might have been a placebo effect. She
seems to be in a good mood.
choice_data_list:
(Now we just need to get back to the
academy...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What's going on? I feel like all my strength is
draining...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh, I get it! These magic circles aren't complete!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So do something about it, Familiar! They're losing
their magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hurry! Move your butt!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay, so next is that white spot?! Got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come up with the idea to continue the path of
magical circles along the white parts of the
crosswalk... and successfully bring her back to
campus.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wait, they stopped! Where's the next magic
circle?!
